title: corpus/manifest.json contract
description: Per-corpus-release pin manifest. Declares which item-bank version this corpus revision is locked against and whether the bank is frozen (cropping-fuzzer gate per Story 6.6 / Murat's bank-frozen-flag discipline).

corpusVersion.description: The corpus-release version this manifest describes (per NFR25 versioning).

itemBankVersion.description: Item-bank version pin. Bumping requires a corresponding bump of corpusVersion and a refresh of every translated content sourceHashEN (NFR29).

lockedAtCorpusVersion.description: The corpusVersion at which the item-bank was last frozen. If this matches corpusVersion, the bank is current; if it lags, the corpus has been re-emitted without a bank change.

bankFrozen.description: When true, no item-bank modifications are permitted for this corpus release; the Story 6.6 cropping-fuzzer is required to have already exercised the bank. Set true at release-tag time by tools/release.mjs (Epic 8).

releaseTagSha.description: Optional. The git tag SHA-256 corresponding to this corpus release (populated by Epic 8 release workflow).

archival.description: Archival anchors per NFR18 / NFR25 (Epic 8 populates).
